title: Custom fields for a board

posts.author: Mayon85 (Marion)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I would like to create custom field for a board. Today, for each board you have a title and a description. I would like to be able to add specific field when I want to.
→ I don’t want to add a column where I can add specific values, because my field concern the entire board, not a row.

Is that possible, how I can I do that? It’s not possible ? Is it a possible future feature ? As a dev, we know that this is a basic demand.

Kind regards,
Marion
